1775180.name: Whacky Golf Demo
1775180.description:
Welcome to Whacky Golf, the most chaotic mini golf game in the world!

Don't just whack the ball, whack your friends! Wreck their shots, steal their ball, and throw it right in their face! Do whatever it takes to get the best score for the course.

Play with up to 4 friends locally!

About the demo


This demo serves as a preview for the kind of game Whacky Golf will be. It has all the whacking and golfing shenanigans with just enough content to get an idea of what will be offered in the full game.

Demo Features

  • Up to four player local splitscreen
  • Steam Remote Play Together support
  • Character customisation
  • 1 course
  • Controller and keyboard support
  • Drop in or out at any time
1775180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
